coverage.criterion: Tenant isolation all paths + RLS backstop + same external_id separate
coverage.evidence: spec18 isolation it() + RLS-backstop it() (SET LOCAL ROLE TEST_APP_ROLE, 0 WS_B rows, write blocked) + pen-test; real PG.
real enforceRoute marketer/accounting/owner; handleAdminAccess writes admin_audit_log; browser 403 for marketer on /billing independent of UI.
created->progress and progress-first single profile, late attr preserved.
real makeProcessorHandler injected throw -> batchItemFailures, replay -> exactly 1 event.
same event_id twice -> events 1, total 1, monetary 40 not 80.
change_log ['entered','exited']; WS_B []; dynamic auto-updates while manual untouched; both resolveAudience.
unsubscribe A only; B still sends; hard bounce writes global_hard_bounces.
60 sent + 4 bounces -> WS_REP suspended, peer active.
PENDING stays onboarding; SUCCESS+DNS activates -> send with config set; non-active -> refuse SES 0.
runBroadcast sent 1 outbox; replay skipped still 1.
enroll idempotent; trigger->wait->condition->action send via dispatchOutbox; re-run terminal skipped, messages_log 1.
computeAllWorkspaceCosts Σ cents===direct+fixed, fixed $40, IP fee only upgraded.

coverage.criterion: IP strategy advisor + upgrade/warmup $24.95 only upgraded
coverage.evidence: default shared; advisor true on sustained 3 months false on spike; upgradeIp warming + jsonb merge preserves verified; computeDirectCost delta 24.95 only upgraded.
switchActiveWorkspace WS_A sees sw-a only, WS_B sw-b only, non-member throws; browser switch spec confirms.
dispatcher skip(cap)/defer(quiet 23:30)/skip(unsubscribe), SES 0 each.

coverage.criterion: WAF + least-privilege IAM no wildcards + alarms via CDK synth
coverage.evidence: infra assertions 11 pass: WAFv2+association, scans every IAM::Policy 0 wildcards (>=10), >=13 fns own role, FIFO DLQ redrive, SES 3%/5%+0.1%+per-workspace+DLQ-depth+Errors+queue-age alarms, no plaintext secret; cdk synth exit 0 (2126 lines).

recommendations: Wire the processor FIFO-LocalStack e2e to run in CI when LocalStack SQS-FIFO available so ordering/no-loss is exercised against a real queue end-to-end (currently the single intentional skip).
Cross-reference the CDK security assertions from the §18 gate file so all 16 bullets are discoverable from one place.
Add a negative-DNS activate() case (required record missing -> not active) to harden the verification gate.
